description: Returns full battle details including round history and participant data by battle ID.

output.description: Full battle object with participant details, round history, and region information.

fields.isBigBattle: boolean — whether this is a big battle
fields.isActive: boolean — whether the battle is currently active
fields.roundsToWin: number — rounds needed to win the battle
fields.roundsHistory: array — sequence of 'attacker' or 'defender' indicating round winners
fields.attacker: object — attacker side data (country, countryOrders, muOrders, moneyPer1kDamages, moneyPool)
fields.defender: object — defender side data (country, countryOrders, muOrders, moneyPer1kDamages, moneyPool)

notes: The attacker and defender objects each contain: country (countryId), countryOrders (number), muOrders (number), moneyPer1kDamages (number), moneyPool (number).
